description: The Fraud Department has detected travel accounts that may be shared by multiple people. A clear indicator is 'Teleportation': a single account having active hotel stays in two DIFFERENT cities on the same date. Analyze the 'demodb' database (user: admin, pass: admin) to identify Profiles with overlapping 'HasStayed' intervals in different cities. An overlap occurs if the date ranges (defined by 'CheckIn' date and 'Nights' integer) intersect. Mark these profiles by setting a boolean property 'Suspicious' to 'true' on the Profile vertex and save a JSON list of their email addresses to '/home/ga/suspicious_travelers.json' in the format ["email1@example.com", "email2@example.com"].
